## docs(pat): Personal Access Tokens usage guide

## Summary

Guide for users creating and managing PATs, and for developers authenticating API calls with PATs.

## Changes

- [ ] What are PATs and when to use them (vs. OAuth2 tokens)
- [ ] Creating a PAT (UI and API)
- [ ] Scope selection and least-privilege principle
- [ ] Expiration policies
- [ ] Using a PAT for API authentication (Authorization header)
- [ ] Revoking a PAT
- [ ] Admin oversight of PATs
- [ ] Security best practices (rotation, storage, monitoring)

## Dependencies

- #74–#78 - PAT implementation

## Related Issue

Closes #121
